name: Taito Magatsu
description: Among the Ittō-ryū's finest swordsmen. Of peasant origin, he became a swordsman to avenge his sister, who was killed as a child by a samurai. Taito is one of the few swordsmen who has fought Manji and survived. He has also fought by Manji's side as well. He can be considered a kenshi, a swordsman who is not from the samurai class. His lover of sorts, a prostitute named O-ren was killed by Shira. He quit the Ittō-ryū, although he is still friends with Anotsu. He ends up following Manji around due

name: Takao Kinomiya
description: Takao is a strong-willed teenager who is not afraid to speak his mind and in so doing, he seems to get into more trouble than most kids his age. He seems to be a very emotional person, and quite often worries about his friends, causing him to become angry. Takao isn't a born leader, yet because of his magnetic personality and self-confidence, people seem to gravitate toward him. No situation is too risky for Takao, and he often relies on nothing more than luck. His style of playing is aggressive

name: Takashi Toono
description: __Height:__ 171 cm Transferred to Mori High. Unfortunately entered Yarichin Club. Hopeless at sports (especially ball games). Gets shy around people

name: Tenma Pegasus
description: The previous incarnation of Pegasus Seiya who is best friends with Aroon since childhood. After escaping with Aroon from Libra Dohko and Aries Shion, he finds there's something wrong with Aroon and vows to protect him, but he doesn't tell his friend why. After realising he has left behind his Pegasus cloth in his escape from the Gold Saints, he heads back and equips it and attempts to fight the Gold Saints. name: Umagon
description: Umagon (Ponygon in English dub) is a mamodo who resembles a small horse, donkey or a sheep according to Kiyomaro's friends. Umagon can only speak "Meru meru mee". Umagon's real name is "Schneider," as it is revealed in the flashbacks that his mother calls him so. Umagon is seen many times throughout the series following Gash Bell around, but he was not officially introduced until episode 23. His human partner is Kafka Sunbeam. In the manga, Umagon discovers Gash at the end of his trip in England

name: Venetim Leopool
nativeName: ベネティム・レオプール
description: The commander of the Punisher Heroes Squad 9004. He is a rare conman who attempted to sell off the royal palace to a circus. His eloquence and deception skills make him appear competent at first glance, but in reality he's a weakling with no guts. He always delivers "bad news" in a hurry.

name: Ai
description: Ai is a gravekeeper who is quite naive, but cares a lot about others. She calls Hampnie Hambart her "father" due to something her supposed mother had told her when she was younger, and decides to follow him on his journey.

name: Akane Sawatari
description: An enigmatic former Private Detective Hunter, she pledged her allegiance with the [Gun Devil](https://anilist.co/character/208942/Juu-no-Akuma) after making a contract with him and as a result, she seeks to obtain [Denji](https://anilist.co/character/130102/Denji)'s heart for her master. name: Alice Maresato
description: Only 7 years old she was saved from being attacked by several undead by Takashi after her father was killed by members of a household who wouldn't allow them safety. Innocent and passive, Alice is the only member of the group that maintains a cheerful attitude despite all their troubles and the loss of her parents. description: [Kaito's](https://anilist.co/character/1747) best friend ever since they were young children. name: Astarte
description: Astarte was a homunculus servant of Rudolf Eustach until Kojou and Yukina defeated him. Since then she has been sentenced to 3 years probation and is currently entrusted to Natsuki, who made Astarte her maid.

Initially she admires Kenshi's wilderness skills, but grows to develop a romantic interest in him. When not dealing with school related tasks, she is nearly always accompanied by two male retainers. searchTerms: アウラ・シュリフォン

name: Baise
description: One of the bodyguards hired to protect Neon. She is from the Manipulation group. Her hatsu, Instant Love, makes every man she kisses her slave. Her slaves enjoy being hurt by her, which she videotapes. She uses this to make men tell the truth.

name: Black
description: Black is a young man who aspires to be the Champion of the Unova Pokémon League. He has been dreaming of this since childhood, nine years to be exact. However, these dreams fill his head to the point where he cannot think about anything else and any attempts to cause him to pass out from mental exhaustion. name: Chinatsu Hayakawa
description: She's a new employee joined in the same period as Shinozaki. She's in charge of design in the 2nd Development Section. She and Shinozaki grew up close to each other and attended the same preschool, elementary school and junior high school. She has a refreshing personality and a clear-cut way of saying things. Although she keeps it a secret from all her colleagues except Shinozaki, she has geeky hobbies and enjoys cosplay.

name: Chise
description: Chise is the main female character of Saikano. She's is a shy, clumsy girl with very little self-esteem and has poor grades in everything except for World History. She was constantly hospitalized in Tokyo during her elementary years, and thus, has very few friends (except for Akemi). She starts dating Shuji, with Akemis help, and tries to make her relationship work with him despite his apparently aloof personality.
